system.description: A god of inebriation, delight, sensuality and pure, impure hedonism.
system.title: God of Hedonism

scriptures.name: Level 1: Party Hard
scriptures.description: Target feels a supernatural high. For every level in this god, you can affect an extra target. Choose one effect for all targets: attacks on them gain Disadvantage (numbed pain), their close combat attacks get Advantage (adrenaline), or they can see the unseen.

specials.name: I don't feel so good (lose bonus, Disadvantage)

scriptures.name: Level 2: Blackout Drunk
scriptures.description: Make all mortal human-sized or smaller individuals within close range of a point fall asleep. Roll your Wis pool and compare successes to each target's highest Stat. If you match or exceed the target's score, they fall asleep. When roused, they suffer a Disadvantage on all actions from the headache.

scriptures.name: Level 3: Higher State of Consciousness
scriptures.description: Alter your mental bounds of perception. On a success: you're intangible, invulnerable to physical attacks, can fly, and can attack psychically using Wis.
